title: ballota hispanica subsp. hispida
intro: Ballota hispanica subsp. hispida is a subspecies of the Ballota plant, also known as Spanish bugloss or hispid bugloss, a perennial herb native to the Iberian Peninsula. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ballota hispica subsp. hispida include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
